description: OWASP Amass: Industry-standard command line utility enabling automated, massive-scale organizational sub-domain enumeration traversing hundreds of unique passive and active data sources.

commands.explanation: Analyzes the target solely using external non-interactive OSINT APIs guaranteeing zero traffic touches the absolute target architecture.
Augments passive sweeps by actively pinging and brute-forcing discovered subdomains pulling TLS certificates directly from root servers.
Enumerates vast attack planes deriving entirely from every routable explicit IP block attributed to a specific global ASN.
Extracts hidden or unlinked top-level domains natively hosted across a targeted IP subnet.
Sweeps global ICANN data tables attempting to match domain structures directly to correlated business emails or registration strings.
Parses the generated local graph database natively outputting absolute HTML spatial data-charts for reporting.
Bridges custom structural intelligence APIs by explicitly feeding an authenticated configuration matrix.
Performs deep-string pattern tracking aggressively attempting to resolve absolute ASN blocks registered to a target enterprise.
Automatically highlights differential alterations directly showcasing specifically which new subdomains appeared since the last executed scan.
Dumps all previously harvested and categorized intelligence strings mapped to the requested domain natively from the local graph file.
